string.name: cat_all_components_title
string.description: Title of the All Components Catalog demo [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]

string.name: cat_all_components_description
string.description: Description of the All Components Catalog demo [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]

resources.string: All components in one demo, to display and test cross-cutting library features.

string.name: cat_all_components_fab_content_desc
string.description: Content description of the Floating Action Button [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]

string.name: cat_all_components_nav_button
string.description: The navigation button of a layout. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

string.name: cat_all_components_fab
string.description: The title of the floating action button. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

string.name: cat_all_components_nav_fab_text
string.description: The title of the navigation bar's floating action button. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

string.name: cat_all_components_menu_archive_button
string.description: Name of the archive email button. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

string.name: cat_all_components_menu_delete_button
string.description: Name of the detele email button. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

string.name: cat_all_components_menu_unread_button
string.description: Name of the mark as unread email button. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

string.name: cat_all_components_search_bar_hint
string.description: Hint text for the search bar. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

string.description: Text for the first tab. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Text for the second tab. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Text for the third tab. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Text for a checkbox. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Text for a switch. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Text for the 'Connected' button in a toggle group. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Text for a generic button. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Text for the 'Group' button in a button group. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Text for the 'Standard' button in a button group. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Text for the split button. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]

string.description: Text for the small extended floating action button. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]

string.description: Text for a card. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.description: Hint text for a filled text field. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

string.description: Hint text for an outlined text field. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

string.description: Title for the Dialogs section. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]
